DivContainer.name: Overflow
DivContainer.description: Overflow property of a container

DivContainer.name: Brand Bg Color
DivContainer.description: Change the background color of the container.

DivContainer.name: Status Bg Color
DivContainer.description: Change the background color of the container. Choose from success, warning or danger colors.

DivContainer.name: Section Overlap
DivContainer.description: Combine with margin spacing to create a negative margin and overlap sections.

DivContainer.name: Flex Column
DivContainer.description: Change orientation of the contents from horizontal to vertical.

DivContainer.name: Flex Wrap
DivContainer.description: Wraps the flex items in their container.

DivContainer.name: Flex Reverse
DivContainer.description: Change direction of the contents.

DivContainer.name: Justify Content
DivContainer.description: Distributes space between and around content items along the main axis.

DivContainer.name: Align Items
DivContainer.description: Align elements on the cross axis.

DivContainer.name: Flex Gap
DivContainer.description: Adjust the space between items inside the flex container

DivContainer.name: Height
DivContainer.description: Adjust the height of the container

DivContainer.name: Width
DivContainer.description: Adjust the width of the container

DivContainer.name: Background color
DivContainer.description: Change the background color of the container. Choose from background defaults, transparent, gradient, or neutrals.

DivContainer.name: Shadow
DivContainer.description: Add a shadow to this element

DivContainer.name: Border
DivContainer.description: Add a border to this element

DivContainer.name: Border Color
DivContainer.description: Adjust the border color of the element.

DivContainer.name: Border Width
DivContainer.description: Change the width of the border

DivContainer.name: Border Radius
DivContainer.description: Change the roundedness of the border

DivContainer.name: Radius Top Right
DivContainer.description: Change the roundedness of the top right border

DivContainer.name: Radius Top Left
DivContainer.description: Change the roundedness of the top left border

DivContainer.name: Radius Bottom Left
DivContainer.description: Change the roundedness of the bottom left border

DivContainer.name: Radius Bottom Right
DivContainer.description: Change the roundedness of the bottom right border

Button.name: Style
Button.description: Change the style of the button.

Button.name: Text Only
Button.description: This is a text- only button

Button.name: Icon Only
Button.description: This is an icon only button

Button.name: Adjacent Input
Button.description: Adjusts the alignment for a button next to an input

Button.name: Align icon
Button.description: Place the icon to the right or on top of the button.

Button.name: Full width
Button.description: Extend the button to the full width of the container it is placed in.

Button.name: Border
Button.description: Style the button with a transparent background, a colored border, and colored text.

ListView.name: Style
ListView.description: Change the appearance of rows in the list view.

ListView.name: Hover style
ListView.description: Highlight a row when hovering over it. Only useful when the row is clickable.

ListView.name: List items full width
ListView.description: Distributes list item's width evenly in available space

ListView.name: List Gap
ListView.description: Adjust the space between items inside the horizontal list

ListView.name: Row size
ListView.description: Change the row spacing of the list view.

DataGrid.name: Style
DataGrid.description: Choose one of the following styles to change the appearance of the data grid.

DataGrid.name: Hover style
DataGrid.description: Enable data grid hover to make the rows hoverable.

DataGrid.name: Row size
DataGrid.description: Increase or decrease the row spacing of the data grid row.

TemplateGrid.name: Style
TemplateGrid.description: Choose one of the following styles to change the appearance of the template grid.

TemplateGrid.name: Hover style
TemplateGrid.description: Enable template grid hover to make the rows hoverable.

GroupBox.name: Style
GroupBox.description: Choose one of the following styles to change the appearance of the groupbox.

GroupBox.name: Callout style
GroupBox.description: Enable the groupbox callout functionality to highlight the importance of the groupbox.

StaticImageViewer.name: Style
StaticImageViewer.description: Choose the style of your image.

StaticImageViewer.name: Center
StaticImageViewer.description: Align the image in the center of an element.

DynamicImageViewer.name: Style
DynamicImageViewer.description: Choose the style of your image.

DynamicImageViewer.name: Center
DynamicImageViewer.description: Align the image in the center of an element.

Label.name: Style
Label.description: Change the appearance of a label.

TabContainer.name: Style
TabContainer.description: Change the appearance of the tab container

TabContainer.name: Tab position
TabContainer.description: Change the position of the tabs

DynamicText.name: Size
DynamicText.description: Make the text smaller or larger.

DynamicText.name: Weight
DynamicText.description: Emphasize the text with a heavier or lighter font weight

DynamicText.name: Shade
DynamicText.description: Apply a shade to your font color

DynamicText.name: Letter case
DynamicText.description: Change the letter case of the text.

DynamicText.name: Wrap options
DynamicText.description: Break long words and sentences into multiple lines.

DynamicText.name: Block Text
DynamicText.description: Sets the display to block so the text takes up its own line.

Table.name: Style
Table.description: Change the appearance of cells in the table.

Table.name: Compact
Table.description: Change the spacing between cells to be compact.
